mean_cn: n.犯人（读作/ˈkɑnˌvɪkt/）；  v.（经审讯）证明……有罪，使......知罪（读作 /kənˈvɪkt/）
mean_en: a person who has been found guilty of a crime and sent to prison
sentence: The convict is in prison for some pretty terrible crimes.
sentence_trans: 这个犯人因为一些很严重的罪行而入狱。
word_etyma: con全部 + vict征服 → 警察征服了全部犯人 → convict (长期服刑的)囚犯，犯人
